raw_text: nattapong warin safran cabin lamphun ltd. northern region industrial estate 68/2-3 moo 4, tumbol ban klang, muang lamphun, thailand, 51000 (+66) 80 442 1778 nattapong.warin@safrangroup.com education kasetsart university bangkok, thailand beng in aerospace engineering 25.07.2017 e awards of recognition: outstanding behavior, creativity and extracurricular activity participation e championship in the long endurance uav, aircraft design project competition, ku e runner-up in tg travel green innovation 2014 by airbus group & thai airways (double prizes on cabin concepts) e final thesis: uav design and optimization using constrained response surface methodology work experience safran cabin lamphun, thailand certification liaison engineer (full-time) 01.11.2021- present e a primary contact between boeing commercial airplanes and safran cabin engineering responsible for technical communications regarding product configuration, qualification programs, certification of galley equipment (per boeing d6-36075/d6-36075-1) and all aspects of engineering issues. e create, check and approve certification and qualification documents for product part numbers being delivered to airframe manufacturers (airbus & boeing). this includes new qualification of airborne equipment and requalification via design change processes. e provide qualification process training and counselling to certification engineers in the team when required. e perform investigation and develop dispositions for product non-conformances. e manage the alignment between engineering, production, quality assurance, sales and other internal teams for deliverables in quality and timely manner. configuration management engineer (full-time) 06.07.2020- 29.10.2021 e led the review of engineering change requests within change control board (ccb) to dampen implementation process and to optimize change impact on the overall system (aircraft electrical galley inserts). e coordinated with internal stakeholders to ensure a fast approval process turnaround time. e reviewed product configuration for transmission of engineering change work packages and acted as a liaison between design organizations (airbus, boeing and embraer) and intermediate design organization (safran) in support to obtain approval of modification to a type-certificate. e developed and implemented procedures and work instructions in accordance with configuration management plan. e managed, maintained and improved the configuration and product lifecycle management system (smarteam). certification engineer (full-time) 21.08.2018-03.07.2020 e demonstrated compliance of aircraft galley equipment design to the airworthiness requirements, applicable regulations (easa cs-25 large aeroplanes and 14 cfr part 25 transport category airplanes) and associated industry standards (airbus abd0031, rtca do-160, as8056 and as9100). e conducted certification testing and analysis (structural strength and fireworthiness). e created certification and qualification documents (interface control documents, airbus qualification test plans/test reports and design change documents edes) in line with safran internal procedures. chassix inc. (global headquarters) michigan, united states casting engineer (full-time) 17.04.2017-15.03.2018 e conducted preliminary design review, manufacturability assessment and design of casting process for automotive subframes, steering knuckles and control arms. e worked closely with product engineers and designers for each new product development efforts. tasks included 3d modelling, engineering simulation and optimization of casting designs and processes. e proposed the most cost-effective mold and tooling design while increasing efficiency of gating, riser and cooling systems in pressure counter pressure casting process. ktr innovations part ltd. bangkok, thailand cooperative intern (full-time) 02.01.2017-28.04.2017 e took part in design and development of the long-range uav for smart farming application. development involved aerodynamic design and optimization, design for composite manufacturing process. civil aviation training center (icao accredited) bangkok, thailand research assistant (full-time volunteer) 04.01.2016-23.12.2016 e participated in the study of vibrational behavior (modal analysis) of aircraft structures in variation of assembly configurations. activities included construction of the test specimens, experimental setup and instrument calibration for data acquisition. department of fluid dynamics and thermodynamics, ctu in prague prague, czech republic aircraft design intern (full-time) 24.08.2015-30.11.2015 professional internship under the international association for the exchange of students for technical experience e designed and optimized wing planform and truss-type fuselage of the two-seater ultralight aircraft. e took part in the assessment of characteristics of small uas propellers using image processing. e supported fabrication of prototype using rtm and wet lay-up vacuum bagging techniques for flight test evaluation. publication design and development of a small solar-powered uav for environmental monitoring application, thipyopas, c., sripawadkul, v., and warin, n., ieee eurasia conference on iot, communication and engineering, yunlin taiwan, 3-6 october 2019. skills & certifications english certificates: ielts
